title: Direction of Shift
text: Let's apply and think about the horizontal shift first. Are we shifting left by $$2$$ or right by 2?

title: Update the Asymptote
text: Think about what the vertical asymptote becomes after the horizontal shift by $$2$$ to the left.

title: Effect of Vertical Stretch
text: Now, think about the vertical stretch of $$5$$ on the horizotally shifted graph. Does it change the vertical asymptote?
